/* Анимации для котика и оценок */ @keyframes float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); } 25% { transform: translateY(-6px) rotate(-3deg); } 75% { transform: translateY(-3px) rotate(3deg); } } @keyframes wag { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 25% { transform: rotate(15deg); } 75% { transform: rotate(-10deg); } } @keyframes tear { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(0); } 50% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } } @keyframes confetti-fall { 0% { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes jump { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } 50% { transform: translateY(-20px) scale(1.1); } } @keyframes clap { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-10deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(10deg); } } @keyframes pulse-gold { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.5); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.9); } } .pulse-gold { animation: pulse-gold 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes twinkle { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.8); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.2); } } @keyframes rain-drop { 0% { transform: translateY(-100%); opacity: 0; } 50% { opacity: 0.7; } 100% { transform: translateY(100vh); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes gentle { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-5px); } }
